nasb.text: (as it is written in the Law of the Lord, “Every  firstborn  male that opens the womb shall be called holy to the Lord”),

esv.text: (as it is written in the Law of the Lord, “Every male who first opens the womb shall be called holy to the Lord”)

cnv.text: 正如主的律法所記：“所有頭生的男孩，都當稱為聖歸給主。”

ccb.text: 因为主的律法规定：必须把长子分别出来献给主。

csbs.text: 正如主的律法上所记载的：“所有头胎的男孩都将被称为圣归给主；”
